jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at PGIMER
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!
